hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】美联储理事米兰表示二月份失业增加了进一步降息的理由；【WORLD】欧盟和英国要求以色列停止伊朗战争以来约旦河西岸定居者暴力事件激增；【WORLD】伊朗战争实时更新：袭击蔓延至中东，油价突破每桶 100 美元。

items.title: Fed Governor Miran says job losses in February add to the case for more interest rate cuts
items.summary: Miran said in a CNBC interview that the Fed should be focusing more on supporting the labor market than worrying about inflation.
items.title_zh: 美联储理事米兰表示二月份失业增加了进一步降息的理由
items.summary_zh: 米兰在接受 CNBC 采访时表示，美联储应该更多地关注支持劳动力市场，而不是担心通胀。

items.title: EU and UK demand Israel stop surge in West Bank settler violence since Iran war
items.summary: Six Palestinians have been killed during attacks by settlers in the West Bank since the start of Israel's war, the UN says.
items.title_zh: 欧盟和英国要求以色列停止伊朗战争以来约旦河西岸定居者暴力事件激增
items.summary_zh: 联合国表示，自以色列战争爆发以来，已有六名巴勒斯坦人在约旦河西岸定居者的袭击中丧生。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Oil Tops $100 a Barrel as Attacks Spread Across Middle East
items.summary: Global oil prices surged despite pledges from the United States and other countries to release reserves. Airstrikes shook Beirut and Tehran, and more ships were attacked in the Persian Gulf.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：袭击蔓延至中东，油价突破每桶 100 美元
items.summary_zh: 尽管美国和其他国家承诺释放储备，但全球油价仍在飙升。空袭震撼了贝鲁特和德黑兰，波斯湾更多船只遭到袭击。

items.title: Bitcoin holds $70,000, starting to show relative strength versus stocks, software sector, and gold
items.summary: Bitcoin is up about 7% from the Sunday lows, even as equities and gold tread water. Analysts point to seller exhaustion, shifting gold correlation and improving ETF flows.
items.title_zh: 比特币持有 70,000 美元，开始显示出相对于股票、软件行业和黄金的强势
items.summary_zh: 尽管股市和黄金表现不佳，但比特币仍较周日低点上涨约 7%。分析师指出，卖家疲惫不堪，黄金相关性发生变化，ETF 流量有所改善。

items.title: JPMorgan Chase reins in lending to private credit firms after marking down software loans
items.summary: JPMorgan's move shows that the biggest U.S. bank by assets wants to get ahead of potential turbulence involving private credit loans to software companies.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通在降低软件贷款后限制向私人信贷公司提供贷款
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通的举动表明，按资产计算，这家美国最大的银行希望在涉及向软件公司提供私人信贷贷款的潜在动荡之前先行一步。

items.title: U.S.-Iran war exposes big market concentration risk. It isn't in S&P 500 stocks
items.summary: Oil prices soar in the U.S.-Iran war, leading to volatility in emerging markets, and showing how concentrated EM funds are in Asian economies.
items.title_zh: 美伊战争暴露了巨大的市场集中风险。它不在标准普尔 500 指数股票中
items.summary_zh: 美伊战争导致油价飙升，导致新兴市场波动，也显示出新兴市场资金在亚洲经济体的集中程度。

items.title: Countries agree to record release of emergency oil reserves as prices surge
items.summary: The G7 group of nations welcomes the idea of releasing oil in response to the surge in prices since the US-Israel war with Iran began
items.title_zh: 随着油价飙升，各国同意创纪录地释放紧急石油储备
items.summary_zh: 七国集团欢迎释放石油以应对美以与伊朗战争爆发以来油价飙升的想法

items.title: Across's acx rockets 80%, massively beating bitcoin, on plans to dump its DAO structure
items.summary: The bridging protocol's team wants to exchange ACX tokens for equity in a new U.S. C-corp or buy holders out at a 25% premium, in what would be one of the first major reversals from token to traditional corporate structure.
items.title_zh: Across 的 acx 飙升 80%，大幅击败比特币，计划放弃其 DAO 结构
items.summary_zh: 该桥接协议的团队希望将 ACX 代币换成新的美国 C 型企业的股权，或以 25% 的溢价购买持有者的股份，这将是从代币到传统公司结构的首次重大逆转之一。

items.title: Crypto code commits fall 75% as developers move to AI projects
items.summary: Developers are shifting toward artificial intelligence infrastructure as blockchain ecosystems lose contributors across major networks, from Ethereum to Solana.
items.title_zh: 随着开发人员转向 AI 项目，加密代码承诺量下降 75%
items.summary_zh: 随着区块链生态系统失去从以太坊到 Solana 等主要网络的贡献者，开发人员正在转向人工智能基础设施。

items.title: Bitcoin slips below $69,500 as tanker attacks send oil back above $100
items.summary: Brent crude surged 10% after attacks on two oil tankers in Iraqi waters, with the prompt spread hitting levels not seen in years and MSCI Asia Pacific stocks falling 1.8%.
items.title_zh: 由于油轮袭击使石油价格回到 100 美元以上，比特币跌破 69,500 美元
items.summary_zh: 伊拉克水域两艘油轮遇袭后，布伦特原油价格飙升 10%，价差迅速触及多年来未见的水平，MSCI 亚太股市下跌 1.8%。

items.title: Why China can withstand oil's surge past $100 more easily than other countries
items.summary: The latest Middle East tensions sheds light on how the world's three largest oil consumers have taken different approaches to energy, with global consequences.
items.title_zh: 为什么中国比其他国家更容易承受油价突破100美元的考验
items.summary_zh: 最近的中东紧张局势揭示了世界三大石油消费国如何对能源采取不同的态度，并产生了全球后果。

items.title: China says 'thorough preparations' needed as Trump-Xi meeting hangs in the balance amid Iran war
items.summary: China's top diplomat Wang Yi signaled preparations are underway for a planned meeting between the presidents of the U.S. and China.
items.title_zh: 中国表示，特习会在伊朗战争中悬而未决，需要“彻底准备”
items.summary_zh: 中国最高外交官王毅表示，中美两国元首计划会晤的准备工作正在进行中。

items.title: Bowen: Trump has called for an Iran uprising but the lessons from Iraq in 1991 loom large
items.summary: The US president might learn that starting wars is much easier than ending them, writes the BBC's international editor.
items.title_zh: 鲍文：特朗普号召伊朗起义，但 1991 年伊拉克的教训依然突出
items.summary_zh: 英国广播公司的国际编辑写道，美国总统可能会认识到，发动战争比结束战争容易得多。

items.title: War in Ukraine spills into Hungarian election campaign
items.summary: Hungary is going to the polls soon and Prime Minister Viktor Orbán has one public enemy in his sights - Ukraine's president.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰战争蔓延至匈牙利竞选活动
items.summary_zh: 匈牙利即将举行大选，总理欧尔班·维克多 (Viktor Orbán) 的目标是一个公敌：乌克兰总统。

items.title: 'Even under missiles we carry on living' - how young Iranians are coping with war
items.summary: Iranians say they are sheltering at home and rarely venturing out on near-empty streets as the US-Israeli bombing campaign continues.
items.title_zh: “即使在导弹之下，我们也能继续生活”——年轻的伊朗人如何应对战争
items.summary_zh: 伊朗人表示，随着美以轰炸行动的继续，他们呆在家里，很少冒险到几乎空无一人的街道上。

items.title: How Trump’s War With Iran Changed the World in a Week
items.summary: The conflict is reshaping travel patterns, energy dependencies, living costs, trade routes and diplomatic alliances.
items.title_zh: 特朗普与伊朗的战争如何在一周内改变世界
items.summary_zh: 这场冲突正在重塑旅行模式、能源依赖、生活成本、贸易路线和外交联盟。

items.title: Starmer Was Warned About Risk of Appointing Friend of Epstein as Ambassador
items.summary: British officials told Prime Minister Keir Starmer of Peter Mandelson’s close ties to Jeffrey Epstein before Mr. Mandelson was appointed U.S. ambassador.
items.title_zh: 斯塔默被警告任命爱泼斯坦的朋友为大使的风险
items.summary_zh: 英国官员向首相凯尔·斯塔默透露，在曼德尔森被任命为美国大使之前，彼得·曼德尔森与杰弗里·爱泼斯坦关系密切。

items.title: XRP steadies near $1.38 as Bollinger squeeze hints at breakout before CPI
items.summary: nvestors are closely watching the upcoming U.S. Consumer Price Index release, which could influence Federal Reserve policy expectations and risk appetite.
items.title_zh: XRP 稳定在 1.38 美元附近，布林线挤压暗示 CPI 之前突破
items.summary_zh: 投资者正在密切关注即将发布的美国消费者价格指数，该指数可能会影响美联储的政策预期和风险偏好。

items.title: Bonk.fun hacked: Domain hijacked, crypto drainer planted
items.summary: The operator, known as Tom, said only users who signed a fake terms-of-service message on the compromised site after the breach were affected.
items.title_zh: Bonk.fun 被黑：域名被劫持，加密货币流失
items.summary_zh: 运营商 Tom 表示，只有在违规后在受感染网站上签署虚假服务条款消息的用户才会受到影响。

items.title: Prosecutors move to block Sam Bankman-Fried’s request for retrial
items.summary: US prosecutors said that Sam Bankman-Fried's motion failed to present any legitimate newly discovered evidence.
items.title_zh: 检察官采取行动阻止萨姆·班克曼·弗里德的重审请求
items.summary_zh: 美国检察官表示，萨姆·班克曼-弗里德的动议未能提供任何新发现的合法证据。

items.title: Bonk.fun’s official website hijacked, draining user funds upon interaction
items.summary: A Bonk operator said hackers set up a faulty terms-of-service message, but noted that losses from the security breach were minimal.
items.title_zh: Bonk.fun官网被劫持，用户互动资金被盗
items.summary_zh: 一位 Bonk 运营商表示，黑客设置了错误的服务条款消息，但指出安全漏洞造成的损失很小。

items.title: Trump’s crypto advisor says stablecoins will drive global deposits into US banking system
items.summary: Patrick Witt, the White House crypto advisor, said GENIUS-compliant stablecoins will 'actually lead to deposit inflows.'
items.title_zh: 特朗普的加密货币顾问表示，稳定币将推动全球存款流入美国银行系统
items.summary_zh: 白宫加密顾问帕特里克·威特 (Patrick Witt) 表示，符合 GENIUS 标准的稳定币“实际上会导致存款流入”。

items.title: Metaplanet launches VC and asset management subsidiaries, bets on Japanese stablecoin JPYC
items.summary: The venture capital arm will deploy 4 billion yen ($25 million) over the next few years to local bitcoin infrastructure firms.
items.title_zh: Metaplanet 成立风险投资和资产管理子公司，押注日本稳定币 JPYC
items.summary_zh: 该风险投资部门将在未来几年内向当地比特币基础设施公司投资 40 亿日元（2500 万美元）。

items.title: SEC and CFTC commit to work together on crypto policy and introduction of new products
items.summary: The agencies have agreed to collaborate in a manner that fosters innovation, including crypto regulation and new digital asset products.
items.title_zh: SEC 和 CFTC 承诺在加密货币政策和新产品推出方面开展合作
items.summary_zh: 这些机构已同意以促进创新的方式进行合作，包括加密货币监管和新的数字资产产品。

items.title: India arrests suspect in alleged multi-year GainBitcoin Ponzi scheme at Mumbai airport
items.summary: Ayush Varshney's company developed the tech used in the alleged Ponzi scheme, which was launched in 2015.
items.title_zh: 印度在孟买机场逮捕了涉嫌多年的GainBitcoin庞氏骗局的嫌疑人
items.summary_zh: Ayush Varshney 的公司开发了用于所谓庞氏骗局的技术，该骗局于 2015 年推出。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Hyperliquid (HYPE)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #15.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Hyperliquid (HYPE)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 15。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Pi Network (PI)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #41.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Pi Network (PI)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 41。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Pudgy Penguins (PENGU)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #106.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：矮胖企鹅 (PENGU)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 106。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Derive (DRV)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #257.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Derive (DRV)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 257 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Bitcoin (BTC)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #1.
items.title_zh: 趋势加密货币：比特币 (BTC)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第一。

items.title: Rakuten fixes issues twice as fast with Codex
items.summary: Rakuten uses Codex, the coding agent from OpenAI, to ship software faster and safer, reducing MTTR 50%, automating CI/CD reviews, and delivering full-stack builds in weeks.
items.title_zh: Rakuten 使用 Codex 解决问题的速度提高了一倍
items.summary_zh: Rakuten 使用 OpenAI 的编码代理 Codex 来更快、更安全地交付软件，将 MTTR 降低 50%，自动化 CI/CD 审查，并在几周内交付全栈构建。

items.title: How Balyasny Asset Management built an AI research engine for investing
items.summary: See how Balyasny built an AI research system with GPT-5.4, rigorous model evaluation, and agent workflows to transform investment analysis at scale.
items.title_zh: Balyasny Asset Management 如何构建用于投资的人工智能研究引擎
items.summary_zh: 了解 Balyasny 如何使用 GPT-5.4、严格的模型评估和代理工作流程构建人工智能研究系统，以大规模转变投资分析。

items.title: New method could increase LLM training efficiency
items.summary: By leveraging idle computing time, researchers can double the speed of model training while preserving accuracy.
items.title_zh: 新方法可以提高LLM培训效率
items.summary_zh: 通过利用空闲计算时间，研究人员可以将模型训练的速度提高一倍，同时保持准确性。

items.title: Lobster buffet: China’s tech firms feast on OpenClaw as companies race to deploy AI agents
items.summary: China-based usage of OpenClaw has already topped that of the U.S., while driving demand for Chinese lower-cost AI models.
items.title_zh: 龙虾自助餐：中国科技公司竞相部署人工智能代理，享受 OpenClaw 盛宴
items.summary_zh: 中国的 OpenClaw 使用量已经超过美国，同时推动了对中国低成本人工智能模型的需求。

items.title: Epstein used modelling agent to recruit girls, Brazilian women tell BBC
items.summary: Modelling agent used businesses to recruit girls and arrange US visas to visit Jeffrey Epstein, Brazilian women tell BBC.
items.title_zh: 巴西女性告诉 BBC，爱泼斯坦利用模特经纪人招募女孩
items.summary_zh: 巴西女性告诉英国广播公司，模特经纪人利用企业招募女孩并安排美国签证来拜访杰弗里·爱泼斯坦。

items.title: Tokenized crude oil: Inside LITRO’s blockchain pilot ahead of its 2027 launch
items.summary: LITRO aims to modernize the $6 trillion oil market by replacing slow, paper-based settlement with 24/7, on-chain trading and redemption.
items.title_zh: 代币化原油：2027 年推出之前 LITRO 区块链试点的内部情况
items.summary_zh: LITRO 旨在通过 24/7 的链上交易和赎回取代缓慢的纸质结算，实现 6 万亿美元石油市场的现代化。

items.title: Asia’s biggest bitcoin buyer now wants to build the BTC ecosystem
items.summary: Tokyo-listed Metaplanet is expanding beyond holding BTC into funding, incubating, and granting to companies building bitcoin financial infrastructure.
items.title_zh: 亚洲最大的比特币买家现在希望建立比特币生态系统
items.summary_zh: 在东京上市的 Metaplanet 正在将业务范围从持有 BTC 扩展到为建设比特币金融基础设施的公司提供资金、孵化和资助。

items.title: Ripple launches $750 million share buyback at $50 billion valuation
items.summary: Ripple has launched a share buyback of up to $750 million at a $50 billion valuation, a source told The Block.
items.title_zh: Ripple 以 500 亿美元估值启动 7.5 亿美元股票回购
items.summary_zh: 一位消息人士告诉 The Block，Ripple 已启动高达 7.5 亿美元的股票回购，估值为 500 亿美元。

items.title: The Daily: Binance sues WSJ over Iran-linked report as DOJ probes alleged sanctions evasion, Bitwise CIO explains how bitcoin could reach $1 million, and more
items.summary: The following article is adapted from The Block’s newsletter, The Daily, which comes out on weekday afternoons.
items.title_zh: 每日新闻：币安就与伊朗有关的报告起诉《华尔街日报》，司法部正在调查涉嫌逃避制裁的行为，Bitwise 首席信息官解释了比特币如何达到 100 万美元，等等
items.summary_zh: 以下文章改编自 The Block 的时事通讯《The Daily》，该通讯于工作日下午发布。

items.title: Wayfair boosts catalog accuracy and support speed with OpenAI
items.summary: Wayfair uses OpenAI models to improve ecommerce support and product catalog accuracy, automating ticket triage and enhancing millions of product attributes at scale.
items.title_zh: Wayfair 通过 OpenAI 提高目录准确性和支持速度
items.summary_zh: Wayfair 使用 OpenAI 模型来改善电子商务支持和产品目录准确性，自动进行票证分类并大规模增强数百万个产品属性。

items.title: From model to agent: Equipping the Responses API with a computer environment
items.summary: How OpenAI built an agent runtime using the Responses API, shell tool, and hosted containers to run secure, scalable agents with files, tools, and state.
items.title_zh: 从模型到代理：为 Responses API 配备计算机环境
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 如何使用响应 API、shell 工具和托管容器构建代理运行时，以使用文件、工具和状态运行安全、可扩展的代理。

items.title: Improving instruction hierarchy in frontier LLMs
items.summary: IH-Challenge trains models to prioritize trusted instructions, improving instruction hierarchy, safety steerability, and resistance to prompt injection attacks.
items.title_zh: 改善前沿法学硕士的教学层次
items.summary_zh: IH-Challenge 训练模型以优先考虑可信指令，改善指令层次结构、安全可操纵性以及对即时注入攻击的抵抗力。

items.title: Codex Security: now in research preview
items.summary: Codex Security is an AI application security agent that analyzes project context to detect, validate, and patch complex vulnerabilities with higher confidence and less noise.
items.title_zh: Codex 安全性：现在处于研究预览阶段
items.summary_zh: Codex Security 是一款 AI 应用程序安全代理，可分析项目上下文，以更高的置信度和更少的噪音来检测、验证和修补复杂的漏洞。

items.title: How Descript enables multilingual video dubbing at scale
items.summary: Descript uses OpenAI models to scale multilingual video dubbing, optimizing translations for both meaning and timing so dubbed speech sounds natural across languages.
items.title_zh: Descript 如何实现大规模多语言视频配音
items.summary_zh: Descript 使用 OpenAI 模型来扩展多语言视频配音，优化含义和时间的翻译，使配音的语音在不同语言中听起来都很自然。

items.title: How NVIDIA AI-Q Reached \#1 on DeepResearch Bench I and II
items.title_zh: NVIDIA AI-Q 如何在 DeepResearch Bench I 和 II 上达到第一名

items.title: PRX Part 3 — Training a Text-to-Image Model in 24h!
items.title_zh: PRX 第 3 部分 — 在 24 小时内训练文本到图像模型！

items.title: How our open-source AI model SpeciesNet is helping to promote wildlife conservation
items.summary: An overview of SpeciesNet, our open-source AI model that is helping people around the world protect and conserve wildlife.
items.title_zh: 我们的开源人工智能模型 SpeciesNet 如何帮助促进野生动物保护
items.summary_zh: SpeciesNet 概述，我们的开源人工智能模型正在帮助世界各地的人们保护野生动物。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in February
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from February 2026
items.title_zh: 我们二月份公布的最新人工智能新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 2 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite: Built for intelligence at scale
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite is our fastest and most cost-efficient Gemini 3 series model yet.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite：专为大规模智能而打造
items.summary_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite 是我们迄今为止速度最快、最具成本效益的 Gemini 3 系列型号。

items.title: Google and the Massachusetts AI Hub are launching a new AI training initiative for the Commonwealth.
items.summary: Google is partnering with the Massachusetts AI Hub to provide every Baystater with no-cost access to Google’s AI training.
items.title_zh: 谷歌和马萨诸塞州人工智能中心正在为联邦启动一项新的人工智能培训计划。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌正在与马萨诸塞州人工智能中心合作，为每个 Baystater 提供免费的谷歌人工智能培训机会。

items.title: Get more context and understand translations more deeply with new AI-powered updates in Translate.
items.summary: New alternatives, “understand” and “ask” buttons in Google Translate help you navigate the complexities of natural language.
items.title_zh: 通过 Translate 中全新的人工智能驱动的更新，获取更多背景信息并更深入地理解翻译。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌翻译中的新替代方案“理解”和“询问”按钮可帮助您应对自然语言的复杂性。

items.title: 3 Questions: Building predictive models to characterize tumor progression
items.summary: Assistant Professor Matthew Jones is working to decode molecular processes on the genetic, epigenetic, and microenvironment levels to anticipate how and when tumors evolve to resist treatment.
items.title_zh: 3 个问题：建立预测模型来表征肿瘤进展
items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Matthew Jones 致力于解码遗传、表观遗传和微环境水平上的分子过程，以预测肿瘤如何以及何时进化以抵抗治疗。

items.title: How Joseph Paradiso’s sensing innovations bridge the arts, medicine, and ecology
items.summary: From early motion-sensing platforms to environmental monitoring, the professor and head of the Program in Media Arts and Sciences has turned decades of cross-disciplinary research into real-world impact.
items.title_zh: Joseph Paradiso 的传感创新如何架起艺术、医学和生态学的桥梁
items.summary_zh: 从早期的运动传感平台到环境监测，这位教授兼媒体艺术与科学项目的负责人将数十年的跨学科研究转化为现实世界的影响。

items.title: Improving AI models’ ability to explain their predictions
items.summary: A new approach could help users know whether to trust a model’s predictions in safety-critical applications like health care and autonomous driving.
items.title_zh: 提高人工智能模型解释其预测的能力
items.summary_zh: 一种新方法可以帮助用户知道是否信任模型在医疗保健和自动驾驶等安全关键应用中的预测。

items.title: Mixing generative AI with physics to create personal items that work in the real world
items.summary: To help generative AI models create durable, real-world accessories and decor, the PhysiOpt system runs physics simulations and makes subtle tweaks to its 3D blueprints.
items.title_zh: 将生成式人工智能与物理学相结合，创造出可在现实世界中使用的个人物品
items.summary_zh: 为了帮助生成式 AI 模型创建耐用、真实的配件和装饰，PhysiOpt 系统运行物理模拟并对其 3D 蓝图进行细微调整。

items.title: Surging oil prices could wipe out benefits from Trump's 'big beautiful bill'
items.summary: Estimates from Wall Street project that if oil prices stay elevated for too long, consumers will lose as much as they gain from the new tax law.
items.title_zh: 油价飙升可能会消除特朗普“大而美丽的法案”带来的好处
items.summary_zh: 华尔街的估计表明，如果油价长期保持高位，消费者从新税法中得到的损失将与他们从新税法中获得的收益一样多。

items.title: There's another energy market that may get hit harder than oil by Strait of Hormuz closure
items.summary: Roughly 20% of global liquefied natural gas flows through the Strait.
items.title_zh: 霍尔木兹海峡关闭可能会对另一个能源市场造成比石油更严重的打击
items.summary_zh: 全球大约20%的液化天然气流经该海峡。

items.title: Robinhood's venture fund, which gives investors access to private companies, tanks 11% on first day
items.summary: Robinhood's Venture Fund I plunged 11% in its debut on the New York Stock Exchange on Friday, casting doubt on investors' appetite for riskier investment.
items.title_zh: Robinhood 的风险基金为投资者提供投资私营公司的机会，首日股价下跌 11%
items.summary_zh: Robinhood 的 Venture Fund I 周五在纽约证券交易所首次亮相时暴跌 11%，这让投资者对风险投资的兴趣产生了怀疑。

items.title: Mortgages in 47 seconds: Better’s new ChatGPT app targets lenders Rocket and UWM
items.summary: Creating a mortgage has been one of the most time-consuming corners of American finance, with lenders relying on dozens of steps that can take weeks.
items.title_zh: 47 秒内抵押贷款：Better 的新 ChatGPT 应用程序瞄准贷款机构 Rocket 和 UWM
items.summary_zh: 创建抵押贷款一直是美国金融业最耗时的环节之一，贷方依赖数十个步骤，而这些步骤可能需要数周时间。

items.title: Oil price jumps despite deal to release record amount of reserves
items.summary: It comes as Iranian attacks on ships intensify in the crucial Strait of Hormuz waterway.
items.title_zh: 尽管达成了创纪录的石油储备协议，但油价仍上涨
items.summary_zh: 与此同时，伊朗在重要的霍尔木兹海峡对船只的袭击加剧。

items.title: Noma head chef resigns from restaurant amid abuse allegations
items.summary: René Redzepi had previously apologised after ex-employees of the Danish restaurant accused him of creating a toxic work environment.
items.title_zh: 诺玛餐厅主厨因虐待指控而辞职
items.summary_zh: 雷内·雷泽皮 (René Redzepi) 此前曾在这家丹麦餐厅的前雇员指责他创造了有毒的工作环境后道歉。

items.title: What did we learn from China's biggest political meeting?
items.summary: BBC correspondents give us their biggest takeaways from China's National People's Congress.
items.title_zh: 我们从中国最大的政治会议中学到了什么？
items.summary_zh: BBC 记者向我们讲述了他们从中国全国人民代表大会中得到的最大收获。

items.title: Bodies of two Chinese backpackers found in Australian floodwaters
items.summary: The pair had been reported missing on Tuesday after failing to reach their destination.
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚洪水中发现两名中国背包客尸体
items.summary_zh: 据报道，两人在周二未能到达目的地后失踪。

items.title: Iran’s Retaliatory Strikes Appear to Be Slowing
items.summary: U.S. officials say the country’s weapons have been diminished, slowing its attacks on Gulf nations and Israel. Iran may also be holding some weapons in reserve in case the conflict is prolonged.
items.title_zh: 伊朗的报复性打击似乎正在放缓
items.summary_zh: 美国官员表示，该国的武器已经减少，减缓了对海湾国家和以色列的攻击。伊朗可能还储备了一些武器，以防冲突延长。

items.title: At China’s Big Political Meeting, a Rare Debate About Inequality
items.summary: China’s plan to raise pensions for farmers by less than $3 a month prompted rare criticism from lawmakers about the country’s threadbare social safety net.
items.title_zh: 中国大型政治会议罕见讨论不平等问题
items.summary_zh: 中国计划将农民养老金每月提高不到 3 美元，这引起了立法者对中国脆弱的社会保障网的罕见批评。

items.title: Ukraine Can Now Manufacture ‘China-Free’ Drones
items.summary: The country has prioritized self-sufficiency in producing a crucial battlefield weapon, though weaning itself fully off cheaper Chinese components is difficult.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰现在可以制造“不受中国影响”的无人机
items.summary_zh: 该国优先考虑生产一种关键战场武器的自给自足，尽管完全摆脱对廉价中国零部件的依赖是很困难的。

items.title: Why Did the UK Police Repeatedly Decline to Investigate Claims About Epstein and Prince Andrew?
items.summary: The police in London interviewed Virginia Giuffre three times over her allegations about Jeffrey Epstein, Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor and Ghislaine Maxwell, but never began a criminal investigation.
items.title_zh: 为什么英国警方一再拒绝调查有关爱泼斯坦和安德鲁王子的指控？
items.summary_zh: 伦敦警方就弗吉尼亚·朱弗雷对杰弗里·爱泼斯坦、安德鲁·蒙巴顿-温莎和吉斯莱恩·麦克斯韦的指控采访了她三次，但从未开始刑事调查。

items.title: U.S. Seeks Extradition of Maduro Ally Alex Saab From Venezuela
items.summary: The indicted tycoon Alex Saab is being detained in Venezuela on a U.S. request. His case tests President Trump’s sway over the country’s new rulers.
items.title_zh: 美国寻求从委内瑞拉引渡马杜罗盟友亚历克斯·萨博
items.summary_zh: 应美国要求，被起诉的大亨亚历克斯·萨博正在委内瑞拉被拘留。他的案件考验了特朗普总统对该国新统治者的影响力。

items.title: A Trump-Xi Summit Nears, but China Doesn’t Know What Trump Wants
items.summary: Trump’s agenda for the high-stakes meeting remains unclear to Beijing, Chinese analysts say, while American executives say they haven’t been invited along.
items.title_zh: 特习峰会临近，但中国不知道特朗普想要什么
items.summary_zh: 中国分析人士表示，北京方面仍不清楚特朗普此次高风险会议的议程，而美国高管则表示，他们没有受到邀请。

items.title: China’s Military Has Quietly Cut Flying Near Taiwan
items.summary: For years, China has flown military jets near Taiwan almost daily. Then they suddenly stopped, leaving analysts to wonder why.
items.title_zh: 中国军方已悄悄停止在台湾附近飞行
items.summary_zh: 多年来，中国几乎每天都有军机飞近台湾。然后他们突然停止了，让分析师们想知道为什么。

items.title: SEC, CFTC end years of rivalry with deal that will mean combined crypto oversight
items.summary: The two agencies sealed their memorandum of understanding to link the parts of their work that overlap, and coordinated crypto oversight is among the top goals.
items.title_zh: 美国证券交易委员会 (SEC) 和美国商品期货交易委员会 (CFTC) 结束了多年的竞争，达成了一项意味着加密货币监管合并的协议
items.summary_zh: 这两个机构签署了谅解备忘录，将重叠的工作部分联系起来，协调加密货币监管是首要目标之一。

items.title: Crypto platform Bullish climbs past Coinbase to become third-largest crypto exchange by spot volume
items.summary: The institutional-focused exchange saw spot trading jump 62% to $76 billion in February, surpassing Coinbase’s market share.
items.title_zh: 按现货交易量计算，加密货币平台 Bullish 超越 Coinbase 成为第三大加密货币交易所
items.summary_zh: 这家以机构为中心的交易所 2 月份现货交易量跃升 62%，达到 760 亿美元，超过了 Coinbase 的市场份额。

items.title: Optimism’s OP Labs cuts 20% of staff to ‘do fewer things well’
items.summary: OP Labs CEO and Optimism co-founder Jing Wang clarified that the layoffs were not driven by financial difficulties.
items.title_zh: Optimism 的 OP 实验室裁员 20%，以“少做好事”
items.summary_zh: OP Labs首席执行官兼Optimism联合创始人王靖澄清，裁员并非出于财务困难。

items.title: Binance.US hires new CEO as exchange pursues growth in ‘crypto capital of the world’
items.summary: Binance and its founder and ex-CEO Zhao now maintain a rehabilitated relationship with the American government.
items.title_zh: Binance.US 聘请新首席执行官，交易所追求“世界加密之都”的增长
items.summary_zh: 币安及其创始人兼前首席执行官赵现在与美国政府恢复了关系。

items.title: Designing AI agents to resist prompt injection
items.summary: How ChatGPT defends against prompt injection and social engineering by constraining risky actions and protecting sensitive data in agent workflows.
items.title_zh: 设计人工智能代理以抵抗即时注入
items.summary_zh: ChatGPT 如何通过限制危险行为和保护代理工作流程中的敏感数据来防御即时注入和社会工程。

items.title: New ways to learn math and science in ChatGPT
items.summary: ChatGPT introduces interactive visual explanations for math and science, helping students explore formulas, variables, and concepts in real time.
items.title_zh: 在 ChatGPT 中学习数学和科学的新方法
items.summary_zh: ChatGPT 引入了数学和科学的交互式视觉解释，帮助学生实时探索公式、变量和概念。

items.title: OpenAI to acquire Promptfoo
items.summary: OpenAI is acquiring Promptfoo, an AI security platform that helps enterprises identify and remediate vulnerabilities in AI systems during development.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 收购 Promptfoo
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 正在收购 Promptfoo，这是一个人工智能安全平台，可帮助企业在开发过程中识别和修复人工智能系统中的漏洞。

items.title: Introducing Storage Buckets on the Hugging Face Hub
items.title_zh: Hugging Face Hub 上引入存储桶

items.title: Keep the Tokens Flowing: Lessons from 16 Open-Source RL Libraries
items.title_zh: 保持代币流动：来自 16 个开源 RL 库的经验教训

items.title: Granite 4.0 1B Speech: Compact, Multilingual, and Built for the Edge
items.title_zh: Granite 4.0 1B 语音：紧凑、多语言、专为边缘而打造

items.title: Ulysses Sequence Parallelism: Training with Million-Token Contexts
items.title_zh: Ulysses 序列并行性：使用百万令牌上下文进行训练

items.title_zh: 乐机器人 v0.5.0：扩展各个维度

items.title: Bringing Robotics AI to Embedded Platforms: Dataset Recording, VLA Fine‑Tuning, and On‑Device Optimizations
items.title_zh: 将机器人人工智能引入嵌入式平台：数据集记录、VLA 微调和设备上优化

items.title: Introducing Modular Diffusers - Composable Building Blocks for Diffusion Pipelines
items.title_zh: 引入模块化扩散器 - 用于扩散管道的可组合构建块

items.title: Mixture of Experts (MoEs) in Transformers
items.title_zh: 变形金刚专家 (MoE) 的混合体

items.title: How AI is helping improve heart health in rural Australia
items.summary: A new Google AI initiative aims to improve heart health outcomes for people living in remote Australian communities.
items.title_zh: 人工智能如何帮助改善澳大利亚农村地区的心脏健康
items.summary_zh: 一项新的谷歌人工智能计划旨在改善生活在澳大利亚偏远社区的人们的心脏健康状况。

items.title: Gemini in Google Sheets just achieved state-of-the-art performance.
items.summary: Today we announced new beta features for Gemini in Sheets to help you create, organize and edit entire sheets, from basic tasks to complex data analysis — just describe …
items.title_zh: Google Sheets 中的 Gemini 刚刚实现了最先进的性能。
items.summary_zh: 今天，我们宣布了 Gemini in Sheets 的新测试版功能，可帮助您创建、组织和编辑整个工作表，从基本任务到复杂的数据分析 - 只需描述......

items.title: Ask a Techspert: How does AI understand my visual searches?
items.summary: Learn more about AI Mode in Search’s query fan-out method for visual search.
items.title_zh: 询问技术专家：人工智能如何理解我的视觉搜索？
items.summary_zh: 详细了解搜索中用于视觉搜索的 AI 模式的查询扇出方法。

items.title: Use Canvas in AI Mode to get things done and bring your ideas to life, right in Search.
items.summary: Canvas in AI Mode is now available for everyone in the U.S. Plus, it can now help you draft documents or build interactive tools.
items.title_zh: 在 AI 模式下使用 Canvas 即可在搜索中完成工作并将您的想法变为现实。
items.summary_zh: AI 模式下的 Canvas 现已可供美国所有人使用，此外，它现在还可以帮助您起草文档或构建交互式工具。

items.title: Create new worlds in Project Genie with these 4 tips
items.summary: Learn more about Google DeepMind’s Project Genie and how to write prompts to create your own worlds.
items.title_zh: 利用这 4 个技巧在 Project Genie 中创建新世界
items.summary_zh: 详细了解 Google DeepMind 的 Project Genie 以及如何编写提示来创建您自己的世界。

items.title: 3 Questions: On the future of AI and the mathematical and physical sciences
items.summary: Professor Jesse Thaler describes a vision for a two-way bridge between artificial intelligence and the mathematical and physical sciences — one that promises to advance both.
items.title_zh: 3 个问题：关于人工智能以及数学和物理科学的未来
items.summary_zh: 杰西·塞勒教授描述了在人工智能与数学和物理科学之间架起一座双向桥梁的愿景——这一桥梁有望推动两者的发展。

items.title: New MIT class uses anthropology to improve chatbots
items.summary: MIT computer science students design AI chatbots to help young users become more social, and socially confident.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的新课程利用人类学来改进聊天机器人
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院计算机科学专业的学生设计人工智能聊天机器人，帮助年轻用户变得更加社交和社交自信。

items.title: A better method for planning complex visual tasks
items.summary: A new hybrid system could help robots navigate in changing environments or increase the efficiency of multirobot assembly teams.
items.title_zh: 规划复杂视觉任务的更好方法
items.summary_zh: 新的混合系统可以帮助机器人在不断变化的环境中导航或提高多机器人装配团队的效率。

items.title: A “ChatGPT for spreadsheets” helps solve difficult engineering challenges faster
items.summary: The approach could help engineers tackle extremely complex design problems, from power grid optimization to vehicle design.
items.title_zh: “电子表格ChatGPT”有助于更快地解决困难的工程挑战
items.summary_zh: 该方法可以帮助工程师解决极其复杂的设计问题，从电网优化到车辆设计。

items.title: Featured video: Coding for underwater robotics
items.summary: Lincoln Laboratory intern Ivy Mahncke developed and tested algorithms to help human divers and robots navigate underwater.
items.title_zh: 特色视频：水下机器人编码
items.summary_zh: 林肯实验室实习生 Ivy Mahncke 开发并测试了帮助人类潜水员和机器人在水下导航的算法。
